name: Rio Kuchlyan
taglineSuffix: , Kenan-Flagler Business School. Focused on credit, banking, and technology.
about: I'm Rio, a student at UNC Kenan-Flagler pursuing dual degrees in Business Administration and Computer Science. I split my time between finance and tech — modeling deals during the day, writing code at night. This summer I'm interning as a Business Analyst at Capital One.

Past experience includes M&A due diligence at a PE firm, fintech API development, and co-founding Vektra, an AI supply chain platform currently headed toward MVP. Outside of work: golf, watches, photography, and a running goal to visit every country.
seoDescription: Computer Science & Business at UNC-Chapel Hill, Kenan-Flagler Business School. Focused on credit, banking, and technology.
